"""ENCAPSULATION : HELPS IN PRIVACY
it means putting the codes and data in one place
for protecting data hiding data this is being used
makes clean and easy and control what people can access and change"""
"""ACCESS MODIFIES IN PYTHON ARE OF THREE TYPES:
public attribute ais when we write it normally like a=12
protected attribute is an attribute where we apply an underscore _a=12 ..no use only a naming convention it dosent protect
private attribute access can be accessed only in the class not the inherited or any other __a=10 with double underscore
 soif you want to access private then access in class only"""
